description: CompositionBlue and green printed top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, double V-neck in blue with green piping and has pleats below the necklineFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w!
